image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know sleep isn’t just resting? It’s a dynamic process!
Context visual: Your sleep cycles through light, deep, and REM stages. Each plays a crucial role.
Escalation visual: Light sleep? It helps you transition into deeper stages. But that’s just the beginning.
Evidence visual: Deep sleep is when your body repairs itself, boosting immune function and growth.
Payoff visual: And then there’s REM sleep—where dreams happen and memory consolidation kicks in.
Cta visual: Want to unlock better sleep? Follow for more insights on health and biology!
